movie.actors: Ethan Hawke, Selena Gomez, Jon Voight, Rebecca Budig
movie.plot: Former race car driver Brent Magna is pitted against the clock as he commandeers a custom Shelby Super Snake Mustang, taking it and its unwitting owner on a high-speed adventure at the command of a mysterious villain on a race against time to save the life of his kidnapped wife.
movie.title: Getaway
